calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintiff: Robert E. Mexhel, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in foavor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Christia Cook Hudnell as follows:
Damages $15,000.00
Attorney's Fees $10,359.40
Costs $442.50, for a total of $25,801.90
Plaintiff to prepare Judgment.

Sept. 2, 2004
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2004 Continued To Oct-08-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
